Horses with status=zero are DQs (off-pattern, zero-scored). They still have maneuver data.
Horses with status=scratch did not compete. j1-j5 and total_sum are null.

headline_findings.title: Golden Coins dominates 6 of 7 maneuvers
headline_findings.detail: Kole Price on Golden Coins (Draw 130, EXH 1083) won the leaderboard on 6 of 7 maneuvers. When Stars Come Out (Francesco Martinotti) topped Right Spins at 1.20 avg.

headline_findings.title: Judge Sapp never gave a +1.5 all event
headline_findings.detail: Kelly D Sapp scored 243 rides and never awarded a maneuver at +1.5 Excellent. His top score of 76.0 is the lowest max among the 5 judges.

headline_findings.title: Judge Pokluda is most willing to reward good work
headline_findings.detail: Richard Pokluda gave 195 +1 Very Good maneuver calls — the most in the event. His generosity index is -0.01 (neutral), meaning he rewards quality without inflating overall scores.

headline_findings.title: Judge Luse is strictest but will give perfect scores
headline_findings.detail: Van Luse has the lowest avg score given (71.22, -0.18 vs field). But he gave 7 Excellent (+1.5) calls, tied with Pokluda for most. He rewards elite work but penalizes mediocrity.

headline_findings.title: Spooks Gotta Whiz has 40 offspring at NRBC
headline_findings.detail: Dominant sire by volume. 40 offspring competing — 18% of the scored field traces to this sire.

headline_findings.title: 55 horses compete in both Classic L4 and 4YO Breeder L4
headline_findings.detail: High overlap between Open pro division and 4-year-old breeder class. These horses are earning in two classes at once.

headline_findings.title: 2-point judge spread on winning ride
headline_findings.detail: Kole Price/Golden Coins Draw 130: Pokluda scored 78 (two +1.5s, five +1s, elite card). Sapp scored 76 with a penalty. Same ride, different judges, 2-point spread.
